map_npcs.name: Sign
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue:
Old Central Powerstation

WARNING: UNSAFE BUILDING
DO NOT ENTER

map_npcs.name: Prof Lyra
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue:
Oh, thank goodness, you've managed to defeat that dreadful machine.
I suppose I owe you an explanation...
My granddaughter - Kat - she wants to do the unthinkable.
She thinks she'll be able to tame the corrupting forces that afflicted so many of our researchers.
I'm sure you're well aware of the effects it's had on them, but something has her convinced she can use it to expand the company's influence.
Meet me back at the Hub, I'll try to get in contact with everyone. We can make more plans from there... {objective:Meet Lyra at the Hub}

map_npcs.name: Scout Rusty
map_npcs.post_combat_dialogue:
Ahahaha, I'm finally free!
Thanks for the battle, buddy!
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue:
I've been exploring this facility for what feels like days.
Oh, hey, if I lose to you I can just be returned to a Save Point.
Guess I'll do that then.

map_npcs.name: Guard Rian
map_npcs.post_combat_dialogue:
I must tell Katerina about this!
You stay right there...
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Halt! The boss hasn't granted you permission to enter!

map_npcs.name: Raider Greta
map_npcs.post_combat_dialogue: Fine, fine, it's yours, take it.
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: You can't have this chest, I found it first!

map_npcs.name: Explorer Dave
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue:
Hey there, {player}, just a heads up the guards really don't want us around here.
Sounds like the CFO has been beefing up security around here...
I wonder what she's up to...
Anyway, I wasn't able to explore too deep, but here's a copy of my map. I'll see ya around!
